query:
-- Extend artists table with full profile fields
ALTER TABLE artists
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS userId INT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS phone VARCHAR(32) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS address VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS city VARCHAR(128) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS state VARCHAR(128) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS country VARCHAR(64) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS postcode VARCHAR(20) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS businessHours JSON NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS profilePhotoUrl TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS portfolioImages JSON NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS yearsExperience INT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS priceRange VARCHAR(64) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS languages VARCHAR(256) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS tiktok VARCHAR(128) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS facebook VARCHAR(128) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS teamId INT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS isTeamOwner BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;

-- Artist teams table (studio/shop accounts)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS artist_teams (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  ownerId INT NOT NULL,
  studioName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  studioDescription TEXT NULL,
  studioLogoUrl TEXT NULL,
  studioAddress VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  studioCity VARCHAR(128) NULL,
  studioState VARCHAR(128) NULL,
  studioCountry VARCHAR(64) NULL,
  studioPostcode VARCHAR(20) NULL,
  studioPhone VARCHAR(32) NULL,
  studioEmail VARCHAR(320) NULL,
  studioWebsite VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  studioInstagram VARCHAR(128) NULL,
  maxMembers INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 10,
  plan ENUM('team', 'enterprise') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'team',
  stripeCustomerId VARCHAR(128) NULL,
  stripeSubscriptionId VARCHAR(128) NULL,
  subscriptionStatus ENUM('active', 'inactive', 'trialing', 'past_due', 'canceled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'inactive',
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

-- Artist team members junction table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS artist_team_members (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  teamId INT NOT NULL,
  artistId INT NOT NULL,
  role ENUM('owner', 'member') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'member',
  inviteToken VARCHAR(64) NULL,
  inviteEmail VARCHAR(320) NULL,
  status ENUM('pending', 'active', 'removed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  joinedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE KEY uq_team_artist (teamId, artistId)
);

  studioState VARCHAR(128) NULL,

  plan ENUM('team', 'enterprise') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'team',
  stripeCustomerId VARCHAR(128) NULL,
  stripeSubscriptionId VARCHAR(128) NULL,
  subscriptionStatus ENUM('active', 'inactive', 'trialing', 'past_due', 'canceled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'inactive',
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

-- Artist team members junction table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS artist_team_members (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  teamId INT NOT NULL,
  artistId INT NOT NULL,
  role ENUM('owner', 'member') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'member',
  inviteToken VARCHAR(64) NULL,
  inviteEmail VARCHAR(320) NULL,
  status ENUM('pending', 'active', 'removed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  joinedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE KEY uq_team_artist (teamId, artistId)
);
